headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -92.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 73% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes and an overwhelming 102 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today.

• The frustration score of 69.1 sits in the upper half of the 128-day range, representing significantly elevated anger levels.

• Fears improved dramatically from yesterday's very low point, while optimism continues declining for the second day.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
